Item Name: A Gift Inside Ghirardelli Deluxe Delights Gift Basket
Bullet Point 1: Our Deluxe Ghirardelli Delights Gift Basket pays homage to Ghirardelli’s 170 year legacy of crafting premium chocolate from bean to bar in Northern, CA. With earth tone colors, this contemporary woven natural seagrass basket, tied beautifully with a shimmering Ghirardelli logo satin ribbon, is designed to complement all decor styles and impress family, friends and colleagues alike. Perfect for every occasion, from a personal birthday wish to a thank you for a business referral.
Bullet Point 2: This sturdy, reuseable basket-of-all-baskets is a perfect gift for every chocolate lover, filled with a selection of iconic Ghirardelli milk and dark chocolate treats, including three full-size Ghiraradelli Chocolate Bars, including a Dark Sea Salt Caramel Filled Bar, Milk Chocolate Caramel Filled Bar, and an Intense Dark Sea Salt Almond Chocolate Bar. These Ghirardelli chocolate candy bars break apart easily into individual squares for the perfect appetizer or after dinner dessert.
Bullet Point 3: Treat friends, neighbors or teachers to a soothing cup of hot chocolate in the blink of an eye. It's easy to enjoy delicious hot chocolate using Ghirardelli’s powdered instant Double Chocolate Hot Cocoa Mixes. Just add hot water and enjoy! Or use it as a base for decadent iced blended beverages. Consistently beats other brands in taste tests because of its rich, real chocolate flavor.
Bullet Point 4: Make this season extra special with our "Made with Ghirardelli" Dark Chocolate drizzled popcorn and two each of our “Made With Ghirardelli” Milk Chocolate-Covered Pretzels and Dark Chocolate-Covered Graham Crackers. A drizzle of chocolate adds an extra layer of texture and decadence to each of these classic Christmas treats. These are the perfect sweet and crunchy combination loved by everyone!
Bullet Point 5: And for the crown jewel, the product that made Ghirardelli a household name, three each of Ghirardelli’s 60% Dark Chocolate Squares and Milk Chocolate Caramel Filled Squares, plus two additional bags of six assorted Ghirardelli Tasting Squares. These treats are definitely a one-of-a-kind confectionery delight, individually wrapped and ready to be shared with friends, family, or savored just by you. We won’t tell.
Bullet Point 6: Don’t forget to add a gift note at checkout to show that special someone just how much you mean to them.

Product Description: Food to Live Organic Mango Strips with no sugar added make a fantastic snack and would enhance any dish you use them in. Our raw dried mango fruits are of the highest quality and completely free from any contaminants and GMO. Nutritional ValueDried mango nutrients are numerous, but the most important of them are vitamins A and E. The fruit is also packed with potent antioxidants.Mineral-wise, our raw dried mango contains iron, calcium, and selenium, each an essential element.DirectionsYou can make dried mango slices on your own by peeling and slicing a fresh fruit and then using an oven or dehydrator to ‘dry’ it. However, the process is rather messy and takes both lots of time and energy.Food to Live Organic Mango Strips have already been dried to perfection and can give you all the same benefits as the homemade variety.As dried mango calories count isn’t high, you can enjoy eating them as a snack. You can also test our special dried mango recipe:- 1 cup flour- 1 cup oats- ½ cup brown sugar- ½ cup sugar- 1 tbsp lemon juice- ½ tsp baking soda- ¼ tsp salt- ¾ tsp ground ginger- ½ cup butter- 1 1/3 cups water- 2 cups chopped dried mangoesInstructions:- Mix all dry ingredients except sugar and mangoes.- Add softened butter and mix.- Mix water, sugar, and lemon juice in a pan. Add mangoes and bring to a boil. Simmer for 20 minutes.- Put the mango filling over crust and bake for 30 minutes at 350F.This product is processed in a facility that also processes tree nuts and wheat.

Bullet Point 1: They are sprouted to their optimal level of nutrients and then dehydrated sprouted grains are one of the most nutrient-dense foods available packed with vitamins, minerals, phytochemicals and amino acids; They cook in half the regular time
Bullet Point 2: Sprouting boosts the nutrition that is available to us from the seed.
Bullet Point 3: Each seed is coated in phytic acid (and prohibitor enzymes) which prevents the carbohydrates in the seed from being broken down in our digestive tract.
Bullet Point 4: Sprouting and germinating legumes, pods, grains or seeds to the highest enzyme activity converts carbohydrates to digestible sugars and active enzymes – increasing the nutritional value of vitamins and minerals and bringing full digestibility to carbohydrates.
Bullet Point 5: Sprouting enhances flavor and shortens cooking time.
